title: survival island. can you survive?
description: in this modpack you will have to overcome some of the hardest survival challanges with skill levels and many unknown creatures what wil you do well thats up to you.
body: this modpack provides the raw island survival experience, you have to level up your skills in order to do most normal minecraft things. if you want to survive you have to do your best for your survival on the island you will meet many different creatures that will most likely try to kill you, but if you train hard enough you might be able to kill them first.
